'''''Tritus''''' was a [[Mere cruiser]] of the [[Mere Resistance]], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Juno (captain)|Juno]], one of [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces. ''Tritus'' was deployed at the [[Battle of Nod Kartha]].

It played a pivotal role in helping the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] get past the [[Orbital Defense Cannon]]s and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] fighters. While its sister ship, ''[[Kethor]]'', took credit for destroying the shield, ''Tritus'' bought the Revenants time to get down to the planet's surface to destroy the [[Trihexalon]] factory. After the fighters laid siege to the factory, ''Tritus'' played "tug of war" with the [[Sabaoth destroyer|Sabaoth Destroyer]], [[Reaver (Sabaoth destroyer)|''Reaver'']], as they fought for control of a dismantled orbital defense cannon high above the planet's surface. ''Tritus'' also led a strike force to destroy Captain [[Cavik Toth]]'s [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] and later went planetside to help the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
